summary: Iteration 36: All 3 Bar module behavior corrections VERIFIED. Backend returns 7 guests. Frontend: Inside Tabs shows all 7 guests, Confirm button triggers payment selector (Pay Here/Pay at Register), Chips button removed, Alex Turner auto-create tab works.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, span cannot be a child of select' - minor React hydration warning

bar_inside_tabs_7_guests.description: Inside Tabs shows all 7 guests: Maria Santos #201, Ricardo Almeida #305, Fernando VIP #701, Sofia Cardoso #106, Lucas Oliveira #107, Alex Turner (no tab), John Smith #104
bar_inside_tabs_7_guests.evidence: Backend /api/pulse/inside returns 7 guests. UI confirms 7 sessions in Inside Tabs section.

bar_alex_turner_no_tab_indicator.description: Alex Turner shows 'no tab' indicator with $0.00 total
bar_alex_turner_no_tab_indicator.evidence: Screenshot shows Alex Turner row with 'no tab' text and $0.00

bar_confirm_requires_payment_method.description: Clicking Confirm button shows payment method selector with 'Pay Here' and 'Pay at Register' options
bar_confirm_requires_payment_method.evidence: Screenshot shows payment selector modal with both buttons after clicking Confirm

bar_no_chips_button.description: Chips button removed from payment flow
bar_no_chips_button.evidence: No 'pay-chips-btn' element found in payment selector. Only Pay Here and Pay at Register present.

bar_pay_here_flow.description: Pay Here submits items, closes tab, shows tip recording flow
bar_pay_here_flow.evidence: After Pay Here, tip recording appeared with 18%/20%/22%/Custom options. Tip recorded: $2.60 (20%)

bar_pay_at_register_flow.description: Pay at Register submits items to backend, tab stays open, cart clears
bar_pay_at_register_flow.evidence: Toast: 'Items saved - tab stays open for register payment'. Cart cleared after action.

bar_back_to_cart.description: 'Back to cart' link in payment selector returns to cart view
bar_back_to_cart.evidence: Clicking 'Back to cart' restored cart view with Confirm button visible

bar_auto_create_tab_for_no_session_guest.description: Clicking on Alex Turner (no tab) auto-creates a new tab via POST /api/tap/session/open
bar_auto_create_tab_for_no_session_guest.evidence: Alex Turner clicked → modal appeared → Confirm → Toast: 'Tab #108 opened for Alex Turner'. Alex now shows Tab #108 with $13.00 total

bar_guest_selection_flow.description: Click guest in Inside Tabs → confirmation modal → Confirm → guest selected as Current Guest
bar_guest_selection_flow.evidence: Sofia Cardoso clicked → modal showed 'Sofia Cardoso' → Confirm → Current Guest card shows 'Sofia Cardoso Tab #106 Confirmed'

bar_add_items_to_cart.description: Clicking menu items adds them to cart with totals

login_flow.evidence: Successfully logged in and navigated to Bar page

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Console warning about span inside select element in bartender dropdown - does not affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Alex Turner tab #108 created during testing via auto-create flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36: All 3 Bar module behavior corrections verified. (1) Inside Tabs shows 7 guests including Alex Turner with 'no tab' indicator, (2) Confirm button triggers payment selector with Pay Here/Pay at Register options - NO Chips button, (3) Alex Turner auto-create tab works - Tab #108 assigned. Pay Here flow triggers tip recording. Pay at Register keeps tab open. All flows working correctly.
